A helper for normalized alias retrieval tests.

Function Tree Node: \Mini\NormalizedAlias

ViStatus Mini_NormalizedAlias(
	ViSession Vi
);

Parameters

Vi

The session handle used by the test fixture.

Return Value

Success or failure code.

Remarks for the normalized alias test page.
Command text for the normalized alias test page.
Requirements text for the normalized alias test page.
